text.title: AI Governance and Compliance Examples
text.summary: Worked example: governance pack for a CV-screening AI used by an EU recruiter.

example.title: Classification
example.code: Use: rank applicants by job-fit for hiring managers Sector: HR / recruitment EU AI Act: Annex III §4 → high-risk Sector-specific: GDPR Article 22 (automated decision-making)

example.title: Model card snippet
example.code: # cv-screening v3.2.1 Provenance: trained on CVScreen-v4 (2025-11-01..2026-03-15), 240k anonymised CVs, EU-only. Intended use: rank applicants top-N for hiring-manager review. Out of scope: candidates < 18; non-EN CVs; auto-reject decisions. Metrics: top-5 acc 0.82 (CI ±0.04); demographic parity diff 0.07 (gender). Limitations: trained 2024-2025 data; under-represents <2y experience.

example.title: Bias audit excerpt
example.code:
## Demographic parity (gender) n_validation: 12000 (stratified 50/50) parity_diff: 0.07 (CI [0.04, 0.10]) threshold: 0.10 → PASS
## Equalised odds (age band) diff: 0.05 (CI [0.02, 0.08]) → PASS

example.title: Human oversight design
example.code: policy_per_class: auto_advance_to_review: sampled-review (10%) bottom_quartile_filter: pre-decision-review (mandatory) sla: 24h reversal reviewers: - hr-lead@faion.net - compliance@faion.net

example.title: Audit log spec
example.code: endpoint: s3://faion-audit/cv-screening/ retention_years: 7 immutability: object-lock entry_schema: - ts (ISO-8601) - model_version - input_hash (sha256) - output_decision (rank int 1..N) - confidence (float) - reviewer (handle if pre-decision-review)
